issues.description: Condition 'HasCardOnBoard' with name parameter is not standard syntax. Should use a proper condition type that checks for multiple Characters with cost 8+. The condition needs to verify '2 or more Characters with cost 8 or more' but current DSL lacks cost-filtering capability in conditions.
Missing target specification: 'your opponent's Leader' is not captured. OnAttack trigger needs clarification that attack target is opponent's Leader.

Second effect missing critical condition. '[Once Per Turn]' + 'when opponent plays Character with cost 8+' OR 'when opponent plays Character using Character effect' – these activation conditions are not represented in DSL.
'Activated' trigger is too vague. Should specify the actual trigger conditions: opponent playing 8+ cost Character OR opponent playing Character via Character effect.

Action 'FlipLife' with count:1 flips 1 Life card to hand. Text says 'Your opponent adds 1 card from top of their Life cards to their hand' – this is correct action, but player context is ambiguous. Presume this is opponent's action (opponent gains this benefit).
